commonParams.background: dark moody background, atmospheric, no bright white
commonParams.lighting: neon ambient lighting, colored rim lights, dramatic
commonParams.avoid: no white backgrounds, no bright daylight, no corporate feel

hero-arcade.prompt: Professional interior photography of a retro arcade filled with glowing neon cabinets and pinball machines, purple and cyan ambient lighting, no people, wide angle, cinematic, atmospheric, dark floor reflecting neon lights

pinball-closeup.prompt: Professional close-up photography of a vintage pinball machine with glowing neon playfield, chrome ball visible, colorful lights reflecting off the glass, shallow depth of field, retro arcade atmosphere, dark background

arcade-cabinet.prompt: Professional photography of a classic arcade cabinet like Pac-Man or Street Fighter, glowing CRT screen, colorful side art visible, dark arcade background with neon ambient light, nostalgic gaming aesthetic

people-playing.prompt: Professional photography of two people playing arcade games side by side, silhouetted against glowing screens, neon lights reflecting, dark arcade interior, candid genuine moment, shallow depth of field, cinematic

party-room.prompt: Professional interior photography of a birthday party room in an arcade, decorated table, colorful balloons, arcade games in background, warm festive lighting, fun atmosphere, no people visible, welcoming setup

neon-sign.prompt: Professional photography of a large neon sign reading ARCADE in bright pink and cyan, hanging on a dark brick wall, glowing ambient light, cinematic, retro 80s aesthetic, shallow depth of field

snack-bar.prompt: Professional photography of a retro arcade snack bar counter, neon menu board, colorful candy and snacks displayed, dark background with ambient colored lighting, nostalgic 80s feel, no people
